diff --git a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Document/SalesLineReserve.Codeunit.al b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Document/SalesLineReserve.Codeunit.al
index 15a14be1..170aa22e 100644
--- a/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Document/SalesLineReserve.Codeunit.al
+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Document/SalesLineReserve.Codeunit.al
@@ -269,6 +269,15 @@ codeunit 99000832 "Sales Line-Reserve"
             if NewSalesLine."Line No." = OldSalesLine."Line No." then
                 if NewSalesLine."Quantity (Base)" = OldSalesLine."Quantity (Base)" then
                     exit;
+        
+        // Skip reservation verification for invoice lines linked to shipments and credit memos linked to return receipts to preserve item tracking information
+        if NewSalesLine."Document Type" = NewSalesLine."Document Type"::Invoice then
+            if NewSalesLine."Shipment No." <> '' then
+                exit;
+        if NewSalesLine."Document Type" = NewSalesLine."Document Type"::"Credit Memo" then
+            if NewSalesLine."Return Receipt No." <> '' then
+                exit;
+        
         if NewSalesLine."Line No." = 0 then
             if not SalesLine.Get(NewSalesLine."Document Type", NewSalesLine."Document No.", NewSalesLine."Line No.") then
                 exit;
